texto: Penn is the brains behind this event. On behalf of my brothers, and all of the kids in the program, I’d like to say thank you.” Neil winked. “It seems that the four of us just can’t function without a strong, focused woman telling us what to do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gina Gordon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Penn is the brains behind this event. On behalf of my brothers, and all of the kids in the progra…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, humor, men pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e men.
